description: Detects shared_ptr class members that risk reference cycles in C++ -- consider weak_ptr for back-references. Simplified from Rust: flags all field_declaration nodes inside class/struct bodies (info severity) without filtering by shared_ptr type, primitive template arguments, or self-referential severity graduation. Higher false-positive rate -- all class fields are flagged. NOLINT suppression is not supported in the JSON DSL.

flag.message: Class field detected -- verify that shared_ptr members do not create reference cycles; use std::weak_ptr for back-references
